capabilities.name: Shared Channels
evidence: Function setup_comm_platform_integration found in uawos_integrations.py.
Verified local PostgreSQL channels state database schema and membership mapping functions.

capabilities.name: Threads / Replies
evidence: Verified nested reply message linking inside short-term memory sliding context via parent_message_id database fields.
validation_results: Nested reply threading and schema constraints verified

capabilities.name: Task Management System
evidence: uawos_action.py and uawos_workflow.py modules exist in workspace.
Database schema includes relational tables uawos_workflows and uawos_actions.
Modules uawos_workflow.py and uawos_action.py implement structured work tracking and lifecycle state transitions.

capabilities.name: Task Assignment to Agents
evidence: Relational actions table maps tasks to owner identities (e.g. Executor Agent).
uawos_governance.py enforces delegated access checks between human leads and executor agents.

capabilities.name: Agent Identities
evidence: register_agent and calculate_agent_trust found in uawos_agent_workforce.py.
Specialized agent roles (Planner, Orchestrator, Executor, Reviewer, Governor, Learner, KM) defined with metadata in uawos_agent_workforce.py.
Agent trust score calculated dynamically based on historical action outcomes in uawos_db.

capabilities.name: Human Approval Workflows
evidence: request_exception and process_exception found in uawos_governance.py.
Relational actions table has approval_required column.
uawos_governance.py manages exceptions (EXC codes), risk acceptance registers, and separation of duties checks.

capabilities.name: Shared Memory Graph
evidence: Short-term, episodic, semantic memory consolidated APIs found in uawos_memory.py.
Qdrant vector collection 'uawos_memory' and 'uawos_knowledge' are supported.
Relational short-term session, episodic timeline event, and semantic knowledge tables exist in uawos_db.py.
Supports advisory locks for concurrent execution safety and RRF-based hybrid search.

capabilities.name: Linked Files & Artifacts
evidence: analyze_unstructured_input found in uawos_dtase.py.
Relational uawos_artifacts schema successfully mapping files, locations, and hashes to specific actions or workflows.
validation_results: Artifact schema and metadata linking APIs verified

capabilities.name: Decision Capture
evidence: record_decision, explain_decision, and causal analysis found in uawos_decision.py.
uawos_decision.py tracks claims, evidence, recommendations (with alternatives/assumptions), and decisions.
uawos_episodic_decisions table tracks decision provenance and causal impact in uawos_db.py.

capabilities.name: Auto-Routing
evidence: uawos_planning.py is present in the codebase.
Verified skill-based workforce routing rules dynamically selecting Reviewer Agent for code review tasks.

capabilities.name: Plan Limit Enforcement
evidence: evaluate_action_governance has token limit policy enforcement.
uawos_budget.py tracks token expenditures and models pricing dynamically.
uawos_governance.py Rego policies block actions exceeding the 5M tokens limit (POL-01).

capabilities.name: Roles & Membership Management
evidence: check_fga_authorization found in uawos_governance.py.
uawos_governance.py bootstraps fine-grained ReBAC store and authorization models on OpenFGA (port 8083).
uawos_integrations.py defines rbac_check, pbac_check, and delegated_access_check.

capabilities.name: Billing & Subscription Management
evidence: Verified customer subscription created webhooks and relational billing state controls.

capabilities.name: REST API / SDK Surface
evidence: uawos_dashboard_daemon.py runs BaseHTTPRequestHandler serving API endpoints on port 8099.
Verified client SDK interfaces for creating strategic objectives, adding memories, and querying state.

capabilities.name: Agent Connection via MCP / CLI
evidence: setup_mcp_integration function exists in uawos_integrations.py.
Verified onboarding CLI commands and setup_mcp_agent_server connection state registration.

features: Generate OpenAPI specs and initial Python/JS client SDKs
roadmap.rationale: FastAPI migration provides a robust API gateway needed as a dependency for secure external agent connections (MCP) and dynamic routing.
success_metrics: 100% of daemon endpoints successfully migrated to FastAPI

features: Nested Threads/Replies in STM sliding context
Create internal uawos_channels and link user roles
Add uawos_artifacts schema for linked files
roadmap.rationale: Enables multi-agent conversational context containment and linking files to specific tasks, which reduces noise in short-term memory logs.
success_metrics: Nested reply trees reconstructed in get_stm_sliding_context
DTASE output files mapped to uawos_artifacts
Multi-tenant channels accessible by permitted roles

roadmap.rationale: Unlocks capability of connecting external agents dynamically to UAWOS and auto-routing tasks based on capability metadata.
success_metrics: Successful registration of an external MCP agent
Execution of external MCP tools inside the workflow
Tasks auto-routed to idle agents with matching capabilities

features: Plan limit enforcement via OPA policies
roadmap.rationale: Required for workspace SaaS scaling, tenant payment management, and monetizing capability packages.
success_metrics: Stripe webhook events successfully process subscription upgrades
OPA checks block actions if plan limits are exceeded
